case_title: YOU-GUANG SHANG VS CANTRELL, HARRIS ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $822.00 FILED BY YOU-GUANG SHANG AS TO DEFENDANT CANTRELL, HARRIS ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1990 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
